identity.name: The Tech-Noir Investigator
identity.description: A dark, immersive interface that feels like a futuristic security terminal. It prioritizes data visibility in low-light environments, using neon accents to guide the eye and glassmorphism to create depth.

gradients.glow_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-white to-gray-500

PersonCard.style: relative group overflow-hidden border border-white/5 bg-[#18181B] hover:border-[#00F0FF]/50 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-xl
PersonCard.image: aspect-square object-cover w-full grayscale group-hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-500
PersonCard.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/20 to-transparent opacity-100

FaceScanner.wrapper: relative w-full aspect-video rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border-2 border-[#00F0FF]/30 bg-black
FaceScanner.reticle: absolute inset-4 border-2 border-[#00F0FF] rounded-lg opacity-50 animate-pulse
FaceScanner.scan_line: absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-[2px] bg-[#00F0FF] shadow-[0_0_10px_#00F0FF] animate-[scan_2s_linear_infinite]

SocialBadge.base: flex items-center justify-center p-2 rounded-lg bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white transition-all hover:scale-110 hover:text-[#00F0FF]

Sidebar.container: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-20 md:w-64 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-r border-white/5 flex flex-col p-4
Sidebar.link: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons and 'framer-motion' for animations if not present.
Use 'Outfit' font for all headings. Import it in index.css.
Implement the Dashboard using a Bento Grid layout (CSS Grid).
Ensure 'Face Detection' component has a visual overlay (scanning line) to indicate activity.
Use the color palette strictly. Do not introduce random colors.
For the 'Add Person' page, use a large dropzone with a dashed border in neon colors.
Social Media icons should be uniform in size and style (monochrome white, colored on hover).
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (e.g., 'Face Detected', 'Person Added').
Keep the background dark (#0A0A0A). Do not use white backgrounds for cards.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
